case_title: JUDY THOMAS VS. WYETH LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-08-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR PER COURT ORDER, CASE HAS BEEN COORDINATED WITH JCCP4361; REGLAN/METROCLOPRAMIDE CASES. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE RICHARD A. KRAMER; CLERK FELICIA GREEN; DEPT. 304.
